我的项目My Projects

营收玩法类型Revenue Gameplay

电台直播间养鱼Audio Room Fish Raising

送礼获得随机小鱼，持续送礼可喂养并争夺鱼王头衔，带动付费参与与收礼流水增长。Payers receive random fish through gifting, feed them with continued gifts, and compete for the Fish King title to drive engagement and gift revenue.

+7.67% 主播收礼人数 Paying Users
+5.94% 主播收礼流水 Gift Revenue

语音房关系拍卖Audio Room Relationship Auction

用户通过多人竞拍争夺主播关系绑定，提升存量关系链价值与互动付费意愿。Users bid against each other to secure relationship bindings with hosts, increasing relationship value and willingness to pay.

+10% 分区收入 Segment Revenue
15% 玩法收入占比 Gameplay Revenue Share
营收活动类型Revenue Activity

新年运势签New Year Fortune Sign

用户可通过开盲盒获得礼物，十连开必得高倍价值礼物；每次开盲盒还有概率获得签文祝福，用户可通过收集不同签文解锁稀有成就。Users could open blind boxes to receive gifts, with a guaranteed high-value gift for every ten consecutive opens. Each blind box also had a chance to unlock a fortune blessing, and users could collect different blessings to achieve rare milestones.

+31.08% 大盘收入 Total Revenue
39.47% 玩法收入占比 Revenue Share

我要出道I’m Ready to Debut

将多日晋级赛压缩至90分钟，结合即时奖励与助力宝箱，提升竞争刺激感和付费破冰。Compressed a multi-day promotion tournament into 90 minutes, using instant rewards and treasure chests to intensify competition and encourage first-time payment.

+17.17% 大盘流水 Total Revenue
+5% 付费人数 Paying Users
